description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade includes a central entryway with a small gabled overhang, flanked by two sets of double-hung windows. The siding appears to be light-colored horizontal panels, giving the house a clean and classic suburban look. The rear of the house mirrors the front in shape but features a large window in the central projection instead of a door. Both side elevations have two windows on the lower level and a single window in the gable, providing balanced natural light. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of North American ranch or cottage-style homes.
description: A light-sided, single-story house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a central entryway with a small gabled overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door beneath a small gabled overhang, flanked by two pairs of windows.
description_view_1: Side view with two lower windows and a single window in the gable, no entryway visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large central window in the projection, no door, and symmetrical window placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two lower windows and a single window in the gable, similar to view 1 but with a door replacing one window.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a small gabled overhang, no porch, and simple trim.
